name: auctions-ingestion
description: AuctionsAPI -> Neon Postgres ingestion system (AWS Lambda + Step Functions + EventBridge, Pulumi).

scripts.deploy: npm run build:functions && npm --prefix infra run up
scripts.preview: npm run build:functions && npm --prefix infra run preview
scripts.type-check: npm --prefix functions run type-check && npm --prefix infra run type-check && npm --prefix db run type-check
scripts.check: npm run type-check && npm run lint
